mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pig WHERE score >= 80 OR issue IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM pig WHERE id = #{pigId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pig WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT AVG(body_temp) FROM pig WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT AVG(activity_level) FROM pig WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT AVG(score) FROM pig WHERE user_id = #{userId}
